data.name: 로봇이 로봇을 훈련시킨다: 휴머노이드를 위한 자동 실제 세계 정책 적응 및 학습

data.description: The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm.
